Question: My mother ______ dinner for the family every evening.
Explanation (TH): ประธานเอกพจน์บุรุษที่ 3 กริยาเติม -s → cooks

Question: David ______ play the guitar.
Explanation (TH): ปฏิเสธ present simple ประธานเอกพจน์ใช้ doesn't + V1

Question: Please be quiet. The students ______ a test at the moment.
Explanation (TH): กำลังเกิดขึ้นตอนนี้ (at the moment) ใช้ is/are + V-ing

Question: The train ______ at platform 4 at exactly 6:15.
Explanation (TH): ตารางเวลาแม้พูดถึงอนาคต ใช้ present simple → arrives

Question: I can't come to the party. I ______ my dentist on Saturday morning.
Explanation (TH): นัดหมายที่วางแผนไว้ ใช้ present progressive → am seeing

Question: My grandparents ______ married ______ fifty years.
Explanation (TH): ระยะเวลา (fifty years) ใช้ for; have been + V3

Question: I ______ this watch ______ my last birthday.
Explanation (TH): จุดเริ่มต้นเวลา (last birthday) ใช้ since; have + V3

Question: "______ they ever ______ an elephant up close?" "Yes, at the zoo."
Explanation (TH): ถามประสบการณ์ Have + ประธาน + ever + V3

Question: Don't buy tickets. I ______ ______ booked them online.
Explanation (TH): ทำเสร็จแล้ว (เร็วกว่าคาด) ใช้ have already + V3

Question: ______ he ______ his email today?
Explanation (TH): he เอกพจน์ ใช้ Has + V3 (checked)

Question: The teacher ______ our exam papers last week.
Explanation (TH): last week = อดีต กริยาปกติเติม -ed → corrected

Question: We ______ a beautiful rainbow after the storm yesterday.
Explanation (TH): see กริยาอปกติ ช่อง 2 = saw

Question: The tickets ______ expensive last month, but now they are cheap.
Explanation (TH): tickets พหูพจน์ ใช้ were ในอดีต

Question: At midnight, my roommate ______ for the exam.
Explanation (TH): กำลังดำเนินอยู่ ณ เวลาหนึ่งในอดีต (at midnight) ใช้ was/were + V-ing

Question: I ______ my bike when it suddenly ______ to rain.
Grammar Focus: Past progressive interrupted by past simple
Explanation (TH): เหตุการณ์ยาว (was riding) ถูกขัดด้วยเหตุการณ์สั้น (started)

Question: You've forgotten your umbrella? Wait, ______ lend you mine.
Explanation (TH): เสนอช่วยทันที ใช้ will → I'll lend

Question: Sarah has bought paint and brushes. She ______ redecorate her bedroom this weekend.
Explanation (TH): แผนที่เตรียมไว้ล่วงหน้า ใช้ be going to

Question: I'm sure our new manager ______ a great job.
Explanation (TH): คาดเดาอนาคต (I'm sure) ใช้ will → will do

Question: If water ______ 100 degrees Celsius, it boils.
Explanation (TH): ความจริงทั่วไป: If + present simple, present simple

Question: If we ______ now, we ______ the last bus.
Explanation (TH): If + present simple, will + V1

Question: The plants will die ______ someone waters them.
Explanation (TH): unless = ถ้าไม่; ต้นไม้จะตายถ้าไม่มีใครรด

Question: I ______ I ______ a car, but I can't afford one right now.
Explanation (TH): ปรารถนาสิ่งที่ไม่จริงในปัจจุบัน ใช้ wish + past simple

Question: My uncle is deaf, so he ______ hear music.
Explanation (TH): ทำไม่ได้ในปัจจุบัน ใช้ can't

Question: My father ______ speak three languages fluently when he was in university.
Explanation (TH): ความสามารถในอดีต ใช้ could

Question: Every driver ______ wear a seatbelt. It's the law.
Explanation (TH): กฎ/ข้อบังคับ (It's the law) ใช้ must

Question: You ______ swim in this river. There are dangerous currents.
Explanation (TH): ห้ามทำ (อันตราย) ใช้ mustn't

Question: I ______ work late every night last week to finish the report.
Explanation (TH): ความจำเป็นในอดีต ใช้ had to (must ไม่มีรูปอดีต)

Question: It's a casual event, so guests ______ wear formal clothes.
Explanation (TH): ไม่จำเป็นต้องทำ ใช้ don't have to (ต่างจาก mustn't = ห้าม)

Question: Your English is improving. You ______ practice speaking more often.
Explanation (TH): คำแนะนำ ใช้ should

Question: The restaurant is very close. You ______ take a taxi.
Explanation (TH): ไม่จำเป็น (อยู่ใกล้) ใช้ needn't

Question: Your parents live in Bangkok, ______?
Explanation (TH): บอกเล่า (live) + tag ปฏิเสธ; ประธาน parents → don't they

Question: The shop wasn't open yesterday, ______?
Explanation (TH): ปฏิเสธ (wasn't) + tag บอกเล่า → was it

Question: "______ dictionary is on the desk?" "It's mine."
Explanation (TH): ถามความเป็นเจ้าของ ใช้ Whose

Question: Your suitcase is ______ than mine.
Explanation (TH): คำสั้นเติม -er (light→lighter) + than

Question: This novel is ______ than the movie version.
Explanation (TH): คำยาว ใช้ more + adjective

Question: January is usually ______ month of the year here.
Explanation (TH): ที่สุดในกลุ่ม ใช้ the + adj-est

Question: This restaurant serves ______ pizza than the one downtown.
Explanation (TH): good เปรียบเทียบอปกติ → better

Question: She sings ______ that everyone loves her performances.
Explanation (TH): ขยายกริยา sings ใช้ adverb; beautiful→beautifully

Question: My little brother hates ______ vegetables.
Explanation (TH): hate ตามด้วย gerund

Question: The company promised ______ the salaries next month.
Explanation (TH): promise ตามด้วย to + verb

Question: There is ______ interesting museum near my house. ______ museum has ancient artifacts.
Explanation (TH): เอ่ยครั้งแรก + เสียงสระ = an; เอ่ยซ้ำ = The

Question: How ______ time do you spend on social media each day?
Explanation (TH): time นับไม่ได้ ใช้ much

Question: Could I have ______ sugar with my coffee, please?
Explanation (TH): ประโยคขอ/เสนอ ใช้ some แม้เป็นคำถาม

Question: There is very ______ traffic today, so we'll arrive early.
Explanation (TH): traffic นับไม่ได้ ใช้ little (น้อยมาก)

Question: My grandmother made this cake all by ______.
Explanation (TH): by + reflexive = ทำเองคนเดียว; ประธาน grandmother → herself

Question: This umbrella isn't ______. Someone left it in the classroom.
Explanation (TH): ใช้แทน 'ของฉัน' ไม่มีคำนามตาม → mine

Question: The bank is ______ the post office and the pharmacy.
Explanation (TH): อยู่ระหว่างสองสิ่ง ใช้ between

Question: The final exam is ______ Friday ______ 2 p.m.
Grammar Focus: Prepositions of time (on + day, at + time)
Explanation (TH): วันใช้ on (Friday); เวลานาฬิกาใช้ at (2 p.m.)

Question: The mechanic ______ fixed my car was very polite.
Explanation (TH): ขยายคน (mechanic) ใช้ who

Question: Could you ______ me a favor and pick up the mail on your way home?
Explanation (TH): ใช้ do กับ favor (do someone a favor)
